stories.title: USMNT's World Cup over, Pochettino's contract done...
stories.summary: If Mauricio Pochettino leaves the USMNT, the question is who could replace him. Well, here are 11 coaches who could be in U.S. Soccer's hiring pool.

stories.title: Gutting youth soccer in America is not enough to m...
stories.summary: Maybe the U.S. is actually making progress and luck just hasn't been on its side -- what then?

stories.title: Reports: Brewers finalizing trade for McCullers
stories.summary: The Astros are finalizing a trade that would send oft-injured right-hander Lance McCullers Jr., their longest-tenured pitcher, to the Brewers, according to reports.

stories.title: Miami's Mensah: Ward, Beck factored into transfer
stories.summary: New Miami QB Darian Mensah said that the success Cam Ward and Carson Beck had in Coral Gables was a 'huge factor' in his decision to transfer from Duke.

stories.title: Fan fired for alleged racist message to Aces' Gray...
stories.summary: Hilton Grand Vacations said Tuesday that it has fired a man who allegedly sent a racist message to Aces guard Chelsea Gray on social media.
